items.question: What is the Food Product ASMR workflow?
items.answer: An AI workflow for generating food ASMR clips focusing on textures, cooking motion, and satisfying bites.

items.question: Who should use this?
items.answer: Snack brands, restaurants, creators, and delivery platforms seeking appetite-boosting ASMR content.

items.question: What inputs are required?
items.answer: Describe the food, textures, and ASMR actions you want to emphasize (prep, plating, bites).

items.question: What outputs will I get?
items.answer: Short, loopable clips optimized for social and ad placements.

items.question: Can I generate different ASMR focuses?
items.answer: Yes. You can focus on crunch, fizz, stretch, or creaminess and iterate quickly.

items.question: How do credits work?
items.answer: Generations consume credits relative to sequence length and complexity. Iterate within your plan.
